arts.ttl: Who is Gil Manzano, referee for the Real Madrid vs Barcelona 2025 Super Cup Clásico final?
arts.sum: He has refereed Real Madrid 50 times with an overall balance of 39 wins (78%), six draws (12%) and five defeats (10%), five sendings off (0.10) and 93 yellow cards. His last game in charge of a Madrid-Barça fixture was last season at the Estadi Olímpic de Montjuïc for the matchday 11 LaLiga 23-24 clash with Madrid running out winners again this time with a 1-2 scoreline.
